servinfo.title: Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits (Keyless Push Start Model)

servinfosub.title: Voltage and Signal Check
servinfosub.ptxt: Check voltage and/or pulse signal of BCM (1) using voltmeter (2) and oscilloscope (3).

item.ptxt: Confirm that battery voltage is 11 V or more.
The voltage of terminal with asterisk (*) cannot be measured by voltmeter because it is pulse signal. Check it with oscilloscope if necessary.

entry.ptxt: Front and side turn signal light signal (R)
Ground for outside air temperature sensor
Front and side turn signal light signal (L)
Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal and parking brake switch signal .
Brake fluid level: Lower than MIN level
Refer to Oil pressure switch signal .
Lighting switch: “HEAD” position, or “AUTO” position with headlight lit up
Ground for evaporator temperature sensor and auto-on headlight sensor
Auto-on headlight sensor: Covered with hand
Auto-on headlight sensor: Illuminated with 100 W light
Power supply for auto-on headlight sensor
Refer to Rear wiper switch signal, turn signal switch signal, hazard warning switch signal and passenger seat belt buckle switch signal .
Refer to Rear wiper switch signal, turn signal switch signal, hazard warning switch signal and passenger seat belt buckle switch signal .
Refer to Rear wiper switch signal, turn signal switch signal, hazard warning switch signal and passenger seat belt buckle switch signal .
Refer to Rear wiper switch signal, turn signal switch signal, hazard warning switch signal and passenger seat belt buckle switch signal .
Refer to Rear fog light switch and lighting switch (AUTO) signal .
Lighting switch: Other than OFF position
Front fog light switch indicator: ON
Refer to Rear fog light switch and lighting switch (AUTO) signal .
Refer to Rear wiper switch signal, turn signal switch signal, hazard warning switch signal and passenger seat belt buckle switch signal .
Passenger seat belt reminder light: ON
Passenger seat belt reminder light: OFF
Unlock signal is output to rear door lock actuator
Lock signal is output to all door lock actuators
Power supply for turn signal light
Driver seat belt buckle switch signal
Refer to Driver seat belt buckle switch signal and power door lock switch signal .
Passenger seat belt buckle switch signal
Refer to Rear wiper switch signal, turn signal switch signal, hazard warning switch signal and passenger seat belt buckle switch signal .
Refer to Brake fluid level switch signal and parking brake switch signal .
Unlock signal is output to passenger door lock actuator
Unlock signal is output to driver door lock actuator
Rear end door opener actuator control
Rear end door opener actuator: In operation
Power supply for door lock actuator
Refer to Driver seat belt buckle switch signal and power door lock switch signal .
Refer to Driver seat belt buckle switch signal and power door lock switch signal .

topic.title: Oscilloscope display
topic.ptxt: Shown below is typical waveform display provided by oscilloscope.

item.ptxt: How to read waveforms is shown below.
Waveforms may vary with measurement conditions and vehicle specifications.

topic.title: Brake fluid level switch signal and parking brake switch signal

item.ptxt: Brake fluid level switch: OFF (brake fluid level: higher than MIN level)

topic.title: Rear wiper switch signal, turn signal switch signal, hazard warning switch signal and passenger seat belt buckle switch signal

item.ptxt: Rear wiper switch: Other than INT position
Rear wiper switch: Other than ON position

table.title: Passenger seat belt buckle switch signal:

topic.title: Rear fog light switch and lighting switch (AUTO) signal

item.ptxt: Lighting switch: Other than AUTO position

topic.title: Driver seat belt buckle switch signal and power door lock switch signal

table.title: Driver seat belt buckle switch signal:
